title: Games of Ancient Rome

categories.label: War & hunt
categories.note: Games of capture and position — soldiers on a grid.

categories.label: Race & tables
categories.note: Dice-driven race games — the tabula family, ancestors of backgammon.

categories.label: Alignment
categories.note: Three-in-a-row games scratched on steps and pavements across the empire.

categories.label: Dice & lots
categories.note: Gambling with knucklebones and cubic dice — alea.

categories.label: Hand & guess
categories.note: Quick wagering games of the hand needing nothing but nimble fingers.

launcher.note: Play link = <base>?game=<absolute pack URL>&room=<code>. The pack is a boardgame/1.1 file under data/packs/.
